hero.title: Transform Your Vision
hero.description:
i-design combines design craftsmanship with strategic thinking to build unique, long-term value digital presence for brands.
From visual to architecture, from experience to growth strategy, we help brands leave truly memorable marks in the digital world.

hero.headlinePrefix: Use technical insight and experience design to
hero.subheadline:
I’m good at aligning business goals, user needs, and engineering risks—planning, designing, and pushing execution from 0 to 1.
Then I iterate with data so the product keeps improving.
You’ll get a PM who can collaborate across PM / UI / Frontend and deliver on time under constraints.
hero.worksHint: Click the links to see the context and process behind the work.

quickProfile.1: Tech-first alignment: surface risks early and convert plans into deliverable specs
quickProfile.2: Validate with prototypes and journeys to keep a consistent execution cadence
quickProfile.3: Use data to make discussions measurable (what to change and why)

items.bankCompliance: LegalTech on-premise services: drove POC validation with 2 banks and improved AML workflow efficiency by 40%; the product was ultimately acquired.
items.microservices: Microservices enterprise solution: partnered with a 30+ person team to build a modular deployment plan; custom cycle time shortened by 25%.
items.crossBorderPayments: Cross-border e-commerce payments: introduced a standalone card payment flow, increased AOV by 35%, and grew member count by 200% in 3 months.
items.securityGovernance: Security risk governance: resolved DDoS / SQL injection crises, established a product security SOP, and reduced operational risk by 30%.
items.dataSaaS: Data SaaS platform (VVIP): led optimization and search experience improvements; increased AOV by 60%.
items.callCenterIntegration: Call center platform integration: integrated multi-dimensional information with real-time communication; reduced manual customer service cost by 30%.

problem.subtitle: You often don’t just need documents—you need someone who drives decisions and delivery:

items.timelineRisk: Schedules get pulled by requests, and risks are discovered late in the cycle.
items.validationLoop: UI/UX and engineering don’t share a validation rhythm, causing repeated rework.
items.decisionByPower: Cross-team alignment depends on “who decides,” making quality and delivery inconsistent.
items.safetyCompliance: Security, compliance, or data integration issues lack practical governance SOPs.

solution.title: The changes I can bring to your product

techDriven.title: Tech-driven decision making
techDriven.desc: Move risks into planning early. I have an engineering background to predict hard parts, break down feasible paths, and reduce delivery/operations risk through process.

uxIntuitive.title: Intuitive user experience validation
uxIntuitive.desc: Validate first, then invest. I use wireframes, prototypes, User Journeys, and User Flows to test requirements quickly before full execution.

dataDriven.title: Data-driven outcomes
dataDriven.desc: Bring conversations back to measurable results. I use SQL / GA-style thinking to locate pain points and assumptions so changes are testable.

crossFunctional.title: Cross-functional execution
crossFunctional.desc: PM / UI / Frontend move together. I collaborate in parallel with design and frontend, and I can step in to help deliver when resources are tight.

aiPractical.title: Practical AI application
aiPractical.desc: Turn AI into real output—not just concepts. Includes speech-to-text, AI validation + automatic report generation, and knowledge base generation to boost efficiency and product value.

pes.title: PES Background Screening SaaS (enterprise onboarding + AI verification)
pes.what: Analyzed requirements and designed the product to build a background screening tool. Planned modules (education, experience, knowledge investigation, etc.) with complete user flows, and integrated speech-to-text with auto-generated reports.
pes.outcome: Accelerated data verification with AI, reducing manual review costs by 30%+; implemented RBAC permissions to support multi-role collaboration.

complianceOnPrem.title: LegalTech on-premise services (validated by the market and moving toward acquisition)
complianceOnPrem.what: Designed KYC background screening and risk identification (PEPs / RCA / Sanction), and planned knowledge graph visualization plus a risk grading mechanism.
complianceOnPrem.outcome: Drove POC validation with 2 banks; improved AML workflow efficiency by 40%; the product was ultimately acquired.

crossBorderPayment.title: Cross-border e-commerce payment redesign (innovative card payment flow)
crossBorderPayment.what: Led the development of card payment functionality, planned a two-stage payment flow, and integrated order management, logistics, and finance systems.
crossBorderPayment.outcome: Increased AOV by 35% and grew member count by 200% in 3 months; also introduced a standalone card payment flow.

dataSaaSVVIP.title: Data SaaS platform (VVIP: improved search experience & data presentation)
dataSaaSVVIP.what: Optimized the search process, designed one-click search, and offered multi-dimensional criteria (city/region/block/usage areas).

callCenterPlatform.title: Call center platform integration (real-time comms + CRM workflows)
callCenterPlatform.what: Integrated multi-dimensional information, planned auto-dialing, data import, and case tracking; integrated WebSocket real-time communication to improve customer service efficiency.
callCenterPlatform.outcome: Reduced manual customer service cost by 30%.

items.agileDelivery: Agile delivery: manage Scrum teams and track cadence with Jira/Trello, balancing quality and schedule.
items.alignFirst: Align first, then break down: use User Journey / User Flow / wireframe / PRD to clarify what we’re solving.
items.feasibilityEval: Feasibility evaluation: bring together tech, design, and business for an early assessment to reduce later rework and mismatch.
items.crossCountryCollab: Cross-country collaboration: act as the overseas team window, drive consensus, and lock decisions into deliverable specs.
items.securityGovernance: Security & compliance governance: include security SOPs, risk identification, and deployment requirements in the product design process.

whyMe.subtitle: I’m not just producing documents—I push alignment, validation, and delivery forward.

items.alignmentDriver: I position myself as a product execution driver who makes teams align faster—requirements, design, and engineering on the same direction.
items.tradeoffFramework: I handle trade-offs in complex scenarios with data and a framework to reduce decision cost—not leave risks to the end.
items.handsOnDelivery: I can help with delivery implementation when needed so the team keeps momentum.

contact.message: Want to discuss your product goals—or need a PM who can push plans all the way to launch? Feel free to contact me. Based on your current context, I can share a clear roadmap (including risk points and priorities).

footer.title: Ready to align product teams faster?
footer.subtitle: Email me: a 15-minute chat to clarify your goals and the priority of risks.
